typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep tight line-heights for headings and loose for body.

colors.rules: No generic full-screen gradients. High contrast. No pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF); use tinted neutrals.

layout.grid_strategy: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID. Asymmetry, visual tension. Mix col-span-8 and col-span-4. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly.
layout.alignment: Avoid center-alignment by default. Left-align paragraphs and headers to build strong vertical axes. Use negative space aggressively.

components.header_nav: Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/70) or solid background with 1px border. Navigation links must be visible on desktop. Never fully transparent.
components.hero: Asymmetric layout. Massive serif typography. Subtle overlay if using hero image (bg-[#FAF9F6]/20 gradient).
components.skills: Option A: The 'Editorial Ribbon' Marquee. Serif font, pale background (#F0EFEB), huge gaps (gap-24), very slow movement via react-fast-marquee.
components.projects_grid: Grid Layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12). Flat rectangular items with 1px subtle borders (border-[#E6E4DD]). No generic drop-shadow cards.
components.blog_listing: Minimal list layout. 1px bottom borders separating items. Strong typographic hierarchy for titles and dates.
components.blog_post_content: Narrow reading column (max-w-2xl). Generous line-height. Left-aligned headings.
components.footer: Massive Space (py-32). Contrast Shift: Dark background (#1A1A19) with light text (#FAF9F6). Massive 'Let's Talk' CTA at text-[10vw].

motion.interactive_elements: Hover lift (-translate-y-1), explicit hover text colors (hover:text-[#FAF9F6] hover:bg-[#1A1A19]).
motion.accessibility: respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure animations convey information accessibly.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute. Kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').

hero_image.description: Stunning view inside modern architectural landmark, clean and bright. Use for abstract visual interest in hero/background.

project_placeholder_1.description: Black and white wavy lines abstract art. Use for project/blog thumbnails.

project_placeholder_2.description: Abstract minimalist painting. Use for project/blog thumbnails.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement routing suitable for GitHub Pages static hosting (e.g., HashRouter or properly configured BrowserRouter with a 404.html redirect).
Blog management: Implement a markdown renderer (like react-markdown) that fetches .md files directly from the public folder.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn Card components for the main layout; rely on pure HTML/Tailwind with grid CSS for the creative 'Bento/Tetris' layout.
Include 'react-fast-marquee' for the Skills section editorial ribbon.
Ensure contrast passes APCA standards, specifically when layering text over image assets.
Implement the 'Let's Talk' massive CTA in the footer using the provided dark contrast colors.
